body_transformation: The serpentine body now glows with translucent violet skin revealing swirling crimson mist currents beneath its surface, while the gray and white markings dissolve into faint, ghostly silver outlines. The pointed ears become wispy tendrils of shadowy vapor, and the sharp teeth transform into jagged, translucent shards emitting pale silver luminescence. The black markings fade into deep ebony voids that pulse with faint crimson mist, and the red eye with black outline replaces with hollow sockets swirling with ghostly white mist.
signature_feature: Hollow eye sockets: swirling ghostly white mist within deep ebony voids.
